2605.04615.title: Beyond Retrieval: A Multitask Benchmark and Model for Code Search
2605.04615.paper_summary: Code search has usually been evaluated as first-stage retrieval, even though production systems rely on broader pipelines with reranking and developer-style queries. Existing benchmarks also suffer from data contamination, label noise, and degenerate binary relevance. In this paper, we introduce \textsc{CoREB}, a contamination-limited, multitask \underline{co}de \underline{r}etrieval and r\underline{e}ranking \underline{b}enchmark, together with a fine-tuned code reranker, that goes beyond retrieval to cover the full code search pipeline. \textsc{CoREB} is built from counterfactually rewritten LiveCodeBench problems in five programming languages and delivered as timed releases with graded relevance judgments. We benchmark eleven embedding models and five rerankers across three tasks: text-to-code, code-to-text, and code-to-code. Our experiments reveal that: \circone code-specialised embeddings dominate code-to-code retrieval (${\sim}2{\times}$ over general encoders), yet no single model wins all three tasks; \circtwo short keyword queries, the format closest to real developer search, collapse every model to near-zero nDCG@10; \circthree off-the-shelf rerankers are task-asymmetric, with a 12-point swing on code-to-code and no baseline net-positive across all tasks; \circfour our fine-tuned \textsc{CoREB-Reranker} is the first to achieve consistent gains across all three tasks. The data and model are released.
2605.04615.paper_summary_zh: 程式碼搜尋通常被評估為第一階段檢索，儘管生產系統依賴於更廣泛的管道，包括重新排序和開發者風格的查詢。現有的基準也遭受數據污染、標籤噪聲和退化的二元相關性問題。在本文中，我們介紹了\textsc{CoREB}，這是一個受污染限制的多任務\underline{程}式\underline{碼}檢索和重新排序基準，並附上了一個精調的程式碼重新排序器，超越了檢索，涵蓋了完整的程式碼搜尋管道。\textsc{CoREB}是從五種程式語言的反事實重寫LiveCodeBench問題構建而成，並作為定時發布，附有分級的相關性判斷。我們在三個任務上基準測試了十一個嵌入模型和五個重新排序器：文本到程式碼、程式碼到文本和程式碼到程式碼。我們的實驗顯示：\circone 專門針對程式碼的嵌入在程式碼到程式碼的檢索中佔據主導地位（相較於一般編碼器約為2倍），但沒有單一模型在所有三個任務中獲勝；\circtwo 短關鍵字查詢，與真實開發者搜尋最接近的格式，將每個模型的nDCG@10壓縮至接近零；\circthree 現成的重新排序器在任務上不對稱，程式碼到程式碼的表現有12點的波動，且在所有任務中沒有基準淨正值；\circfour 我們精調的\textsc{CoREB-Reranker}是第一個在所有三個任務中實現一致增益的模型。數據和模型已發布。
2605.04615.author: Siqiao Xue et.al.
2605.04615.authors: Siqiao Xue, Zihan Liao, Jin Qin, Ziyin Zhang, Yixiang Mu, Fan Zhou, Hang Yu
